title: Galaxy Digital to Manage $125M Onchain Yield Fund with Sharplink
summary: Galaxy Digital will manage a new $125 million fund with Sharplink, combining staked ETH and additional capital. This fund aims to generate yield directly on the blockchain, offering new opportunities for investors.
body:
Galaxy Digital, a major crypto financial services firm, will manage a new $125 million onchain yield fund in partnership with Sharplink. The fund will be seeded with $100 million from Sharplink’s staked Ethereum (ETH) treasury and $25 million from Galaxy. This initiative aims to leverage blockchain technology to generate yield, or investment returns, directly on the network.

This fund is significant because it brings institutional-grade yield strategies to the blockchain. For everyday investors, it means more options to earn passive income from crypto assets without needing to manage complex staking or yield strategies themselves. Think of it like a high-yield savings account, but for cryptocurrency.

If you're interested in this type of investment, keep an eye out for updates from Galaxy Digital and Sharplink. While the fund is currently targeted at institutional investors, similar products may become available to retail investors in the future. For now, you can explore staking your own ETH or other yield-generating opportunities on platforms like Lido or Aave.
twitterThread: 💰 Galaxy Digital and Sharplink are launching a $125M onchain yield fund. Here’s what it means for you.

The fund combines $100M from Sharplink’s staked ETH and $25M from Galaxy. 

In plain English: They’re pooling crypto to earn more crypto, directly on the blockchain.

Why this matters: It’s a sign that big players are betting on blockchain-based yield strategies. 

Think of it like a high-yield savings account, but for crypto.

The part that matters for you: More yield options could mean better returns for everyday investors down the line.

Keep an eye out for similar products opening up to retail investors.

If you’ve ever wanted to earn passive income from crypto, this is a step in the right direction. 

For now, check out platforms like Lido or Aave to start earning yield today.
standaloneTweet: Galaxy Digital and Sharplink are launching a $125M onchain yield fund. This could mean more high-yield crypto options for everyday investors soon. 💰
